---
title: "Week 4: Data Acquisition II"
published-title: week_4
engine: knitr
freeze: auto
---

This lecture answers the following questions:

- How do we digitize text?
- How do we digitize speech?

## Slides 

Please click [here to download the latest version of the slides](./slides/20241105-ocr_whisper.pdf).

```{css echo=FALSE}

.embed-container {
    position: relative;
    padding-bottom: 129%;
    height: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    max-width: 100%;
}

.embed-container iframe,
.embed-container object,
.embed-container embed {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
}

```

Alternatively, read it here (probably not the best if you're visiting this page on a mobile device):

<div class="embed-container">
  <iframe src="./slides/20241105-ocr_whisper.pdf" style="border: 0.5px"></iframe>
</div>
